title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE LANOT ГўВҖВ“ LOCTUGAN ГўВҖВ“ PANITAN ГўВҖВ“ BOUNDARY ROAD IN ROXAS CITY AND THE MUNICIPALITY OF PANITAN, PROVINCE OF CAPIZ INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 2016; 109 OG No. 20, 3546 (May 20, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10383, March 14, 2013 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE LANOT ГўВҖВ“ LOCTUGAN ГўВҖВ“ PANITAN ГўВҖВ“ BOUNDARY ROAD IN ROXAS CITY AND THE MUNICIPALITY OF PANITAN, PROVINCE OF CAPIZ INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The 3.5-kilometer Lanot ГўВҖВ“ Loctugan ГўВҖВ“ Panitan ГўВҖВ“ Boundary Road in Roxas City and the Municipality of Panitan, Province of Capiz is hereby converted into a national road under the jurisdiction and supervision of the Department of Public Works and Highways.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of Public Works and Highways shall include in the DepartmentГўВҖВҷs program the improvement, repair and maintenance of the said road, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on August 3, 2011 and December 18, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

MAR 14, 2013

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
